notes: Basic-copula conditional-probability pairs (CLOSED-FORM Gaussian, Kendall-tau rho, inline NormCDF/NormInv, no ML). Pairs EU/GU(0/1) AU/NU(2/3) XAU/EU(4/0). Host via framework magic; partner via QM_BasketOpenPosition. Warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form/deterministic, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
